title: 6 Pcs Large Clear Balloons 18 Inches Bobo Bubble Round Stuffing Fillable Transparent Crystal Orb to Fill with Gift
features: Clear Bubble Balloons Personalised: Bobo balloons clear wide neck, with see-through design, can be filled with small accessories, like decals, feathers, confetti, glitter, charms to create your own chic and cute style transparent round balloons.
Bobo Balloons Clear 18 Inches: before inflated is 17.5 cm/6.9 inches, after inflated is 45 cm/18 inches. Transparent balloons large enough for your different use.
Premium Material: Non-toxic, No Odor, long-lasting, safe and durable, not easy to break.
Special Material: Special PVC material and there are seams on the surface of the sphere, so deflated quickerly than others balloons, please do not inflate the balloon too early before the decorating.

Widely Usage: Deco bubble balloon 18 inch can be uaed as unique photo props in any occasions, like birthday, wedding, Christmas, etc. Also you can use clear balloons to fill with gift, send your handicrafts gifts to your family and friends
description: 6 Pieces Jumbo Bobo Balloons Clear Round Balloons Reusable Fillable Transparent for Photo Shoot DIY Wedding Birthday Halloween Party Festival Decoration How to Use: Step 1. Stretch the balloon all the way around and the centre too( If after inflating, the balloon is not a sphere, repeat step 1.) Step 2. Put the decorations into the balloon. Make You Own Clear Round Balloons Step 3. Make the balloon into a sphere with an electric pump. ( Manual inflation may be much less than 18 inches). Step 4. Tie a knot. ( After filling the air, knot the mouth first, then you can use a seal cord (not included) to avoid leakag.) Warm Tips: Perfect size is Inflate the balloon looks like a glass, also 18 inches is the most suitable size and will not burst. Clear Balloons for Stuffing Transparent Balloons for Stuffing
